title: Executor (Imperial rank)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Executor}}
The '''Executor''' was the person appointed by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to serve as [[Commander-in-Chief/Legends|Commander-in-Chief]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Military/Legends|forces]] on behalf of the Emperor. The position was also referred to as '''Imperial Executor''', '''Military Executor''', '''Darkside Executor''', or a number of combinations of the three.

When Emperor Palpatine was "reborn" in [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] bodies and led a renewed assault against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10]]–[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], he named [[Sedriss QL|Sedriss]] as his new Executor. When Sedriss was later killed by [[Ood Bnar]] some time before Palpatine's final death, he was replaced by [[Xecr Nist]].

==List of Executors==
*[[Sedriss QL]] ([[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]])
*[[Xecr Nist]] (10–[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]])
<!--PLEASE DO NOT ADD DARTH VADER TO THIS LIST. THERE IS NO SOURCE THAT SAYS DARTH VADER WAS AN IMPERIAL MILITARY EXECUTOR. IF YOU ADD DARTH VADER TO THIS LIST WITHOUT A PROPER SOURCE, YOU MAY BE ISSUED A FANON WARNING.-->
